---
title: q.portfolio Roadmap
---

Only open work is listed here. Completed items are removed.

## Planned

- [ ] Attribution and risk decomposition
- [ ] Component and marginal risk contributions
- [ ] Scenario and stress-test losses
- [ ] Liquidity-adjusted risk measures
- [ ] Exposure and turnover analysis
- [ ] Portfolio optimization (skfolio/Riskfolio-style)
